ここに記載しているマンガは一例です。疑問点や質問等ございましたら、お気軽にお問い: The manga shown here are examples. If you have any questions or inquiries, please feel free to contact us!!
はい、全国対応しています。オンラインでのヒアリング・打ち合わせが可能ですので、場: Yes, we serve nationwide. Since online hearings and meetings are possible, you can request from anywhere.
30万円からご対応可能です。ページ数・タッチ・用途によって変動しますので、まずは: We can accommodate from ¥300,000. Prices vary depending on the number of pages, style, and purpose. Please feel free to contact us first. Estimates are free.
納品後の著作権はお客様に帰属しますので、Web・SNS・印刷物・動画など、自由に: Copyright after delivery belongs to you, so you can freely use it for websites, social media, printed materials, videos, etc. Details on secondary use will be explained at the time of contract.
はい、ご要望に合わせて最適なタッチをご提案します。少年漫画風、少女漫画風、ビジネ: Yes, we propose the optimal touch according to your requirements. You can choose according to your purpose and target, such as boys' manga style, girls' manga style, or simple business-oriented touch.
Web用（JPEG/PNG/WebP）、印刷用（高解像度PDF/AI）、SNS用: We deliver in formats according to your needs, such as Web (JPEG/PNG/WebP), Print (high-resolution PDF/AI), and SNS (optimal size for each platform).
内容やページ数にもよりますが、通常3〜8週間程度です。ヒアリングからシナリオ作成: Depending on the content and number of pages, it typically takes 3-8 weeks. The schedule includes hearing, scenario creation, name confirmation, drawing, and revision handling. If you're in a hurry, please feel free to contact us.
もちろんです。プロのシナリオライターが、ビジネス目的に沿ったストーリーを一から作: Of course. Our professional scenario writers create stories from scratch that align with your business objectives. Based on your hearing content, we propose scenarios that maximize your appeal points.
プランによって異なりますが、ライトプランで2回、スタンダードで3回、プレミアムで: It depends on the plan, but the Light plan allows 2 revisions, Standard allows 3 revisions, and Premium allows unlimited revisions. Revisions at the scenario and name stage are most efficient, so we make sure to align early on.
企業の想いも、商品の良さも、働く人の魅力も。伝えたいことはたくさんある。でもどれ: Your company's passion, your product's value, your people's appeal — there's so much to convey. But even heartfelt words go unread if no one stops to look. People are moved by empathy, not explanation. Even complex topics land easily as stories. With manga, your message gets read, understood, and remembered.
採用・営業・研修・会社紹介・創業ストーリー。企業の課題解決に特化したマンガ制作サ: Recruitment, sales, training, company introductions, founding stories — a manga production service specialized in solving business challenges. From hearing your needs to scenario design, artwork, and delivery — leave it all to us. We turn what you want to say into manga that truly connects. Once created, it works across every channel: web, social media, presentations, and more.
